theory.canonical_statement: ID 466 establishes the quantification of information density in TZP systems. Each state transition within the 153,600 dimensional manifold encodes approximately 17.23 bits. Tracking this is critical for the "Dual Channel" extraction architecture efficiency. Capacity Monitoring: Ensures the left vortex channel operates near the Bekenstein and Holevo bounds. Transition Logging: Records bits per measurement to maintain information energy balance.
